Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7007 0 0}Um... Today's the last day of summer vacation, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7111 0 0}...I was wondering if you had any plans today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}I-I just wanted to ask. No reason...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Amada wants[n]to say something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I invite him to the film festival?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada looks happy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7084 0 0}I always thought there was something I had to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I could never really figure out what it was...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I've made up my mind... The next chance I get, I'll do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada has a serious expression...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I doubt he's in the mood[n]to go to the movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}Now that I'm a part of the team, I see you all differently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}...I'll do my best, as a member of SEES.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada has a serious expression...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I doubt he's in the mood[n]to go to the movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}
